title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: If you have a severe problem with the mitral valve in your heart, your doctor may recommend

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: a robotic mitral valve replacement if it can't be repaired.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Your mitral valve is one of the four valves in your heart.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: It lies between your left atrium or upper chamber and left ventricle or lower chamber.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Oxygen-rich blood coming from your lungs goes into the left atrium.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: When your left atrium contracts, blood flows through your open mitral valve and into your

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: left ventricle.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: When your left ventricle contracts, your mitral valve closes to prevent blood from flowing

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: back into your left atrium.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Your mitral valve has two leaflets, an anterior or front leaflet, and a posterior or back

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: leaflet.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: String-like tissue, called tendinous cords, attach both leaflets to the inside of your

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: left ventricle.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: The tendinous cords help prevent blood from flowing back into your atrium.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: You may have one or both of the two main problems that can happen to your mitral valve.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: One problem is stenosis, in which the opening in your mitral valve is two narrow.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: The narrow opening reduces the amount of blood flowing through the valve from your left

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: atrium to your left ventricle.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Your mental valve stenosis may be caused by rheumatic fever or heart-birth defects.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: The other problem your valve may have is regurgitation, in which your mitral valve doesn't

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: close completely.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Retraction allows blood to leak back into your left atrium when your left ventricle contracts.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Mitral valve regurgitation may be caused by mitral valve prolapse, in which the valve leaflets

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: and cords become weak and loose.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Rheumatic heart disease, which may result from rheumatic fever, heart-birth defects, or

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: heart enlargement, called dilation, which may result from a heart attack.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Both stenosis and regurgitation strain your heart because it has to pump harder to move

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: oxygen-rich blood to your body.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Before your procedure, an intravenous line will be started.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: You may be given antibiotics through the IV to decrease your chance of infection.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: You will be given general anesthesia to make you unconscious and pain-free during the

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: procedure.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: A breathing tube will be inserted through your mouth and down your throat to help you

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: breathe during the procedure.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Your surgeon will typically make four or five small incisions on the right side of your

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: chest.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: An assistant will insert a special camera called an endoscope and other tools attached

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: to the robotic arms through the incisions.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Unlike standard laparoscopic instruments, these tools can rotate 360 degrees and have more

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: flexibility than the human wrist.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Seated at a special console, your surgeon will operate the robotic arms and the camera

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: with joystick-like controls and foot pedals.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: A computer will translate the exact movements of your surgeon's hands into precise movements

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: of the surgical tools.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Your surgeon will have a magnified three-dimensional stereoscopic view inside your body through

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: a high-definition vision system.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: After the robotic arms are in place, you will be placed on a heart-long machine.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: This machine will take over the functions of your heart and lungs while your heart is

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: stopped for your operation.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Your surgeon will begin the procedure on your heart by making an incision in your left

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: atrium to get to your mitral valve.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Next, all of your mitral valve's attachments to your heart will be cut and the valve will

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: be removed.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Your damaged mitral valve may be replaced with an artificial mechanical valve.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: A mechanical mitral valve will last a lifetime.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: However, they require you to take blood thinner medication for the rest of your life.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Alternatively, your mitral valve may be replaced with a valve made from human or animal tissue.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: A tissue mitral valve may not last as long as a mechanical valve.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: However, the natural tissue does not require blood thinner medication.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Once your new valve is in place, your surgeon will restart the beating of your heart and

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: remove the attachments to the heart-long machine.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: At the end of your procedure, your skin incisions will be closed with stitches, staples, surgical

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: glue, or skin closure strips.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: After your procedure, your breathing tube will be removed and you will be taken to the

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: intensive care unit or ICU for monitoring.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: You will be given pain medication as needed.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: You may continue to receive fluids and medications through your IV.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: You will be given blood thinner medication if you have a mechanical valve.

title: ANR13009 Robotic Mitral Valve Replacement
text_en: Most patients are released from the hospital about a week after the procedure.
